mapper.select: SELECT id, round, title, image_url, is_visible, created_at, updated_at FROM quiz_answers WHERE is_visible = true ORDER BY round DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, round, title, image_url, is_visible, created_at, updated_at FROM quiz_answers ORDER BY round DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_answers (round, title, image_url, is_visible, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{round}, #{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{visible}, NOW(), NOW())
